## Action

Run `/nick-weekly` to review these positions — one or more kill conditions may be triggered.

## Threshold Reference

- **RSI OVERSOLD** (<40): momentum collapsed — investigate thesis break vs buying opportunity
- **MA20 BELOW** (>5% below MA20): price breakdown — check if thesis support holds
- **RS WEAK** (<-3% vs SPY 10d): rotation out — monitor if sector-wide or stock-specific
